headline: How Ledn’s $188M Bitcoin-Backed Bond Changes the Game for BTC Credit Markets
summary: Ledn uses familiar infrastructure like Fidelity and S&P Global (SPGI) to attract the dollar capital needed to lower loan rates.

headline: S&P Global Ratings Change the Bitcoin Lending Landscape
summary: Obtaining an S&P Global (SPGI) rating has opened the Bitcoin lending market to insurance companies and traditional credit funds.

headline: Will the S&P 500 Ever Close Again? A New Deal Means 24/7 Trading.

headline: S&P Global Market Intelligence Releases Annual Rankings of Best-Performing U.S. Community Banks, Public Banks and Credit Unions for 2025
summary: S&P Global Market Intelligence today released its annual rankings for 2025's best-performing community banks with assets between $3 billion and $10 billion, community banks with assets below $3 billion, credit unions, U.S. public banks with more than $10 billion in total assets and community banks by region for the Midwest, Northeast, South Central, Southeast and West.

headline: Baron Opportunity Fund Sold Its Stake in The Trade Desk (TTD) Due to Competitive Pressure
summary: Baron Capital, an investment Management Company, released its fourth quarter 2025 investor letter for its “Baron Opportunity Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund returned 4.63% (Institutional Shares) in Q4 2025, outperforming the Russell 3000 Growth Index’s (the Benchmark) 1.14% gain and the S&P 500 Index’s 2.66% return. The Fund […]

headline: S&P Global Acquires Enertel AI Corporation to Enhance Power Market Offering
summary: S&P Global today announced the completion of its acquisition of Enertel AI Corporation, a company specializing in AI and machine learning-driven short-term power price forecasting for North American electricity markets.
